title: saponaria floribunda
intro: Saponaria floribunda, also known as soapwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to create a rich lather when mixed with water, which is due to its high saponin content. The health benefits of saponaria floribunda include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Saponaria floribunda can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and is also used in traditional soap-making and as a natural shampoo.
